# md-share storage

This repository stores encrypted markdown shares for [md-share](https://github.com/alankyshum/md-share).

Each share lives at `shares/<2-char-prefix>/<full-key>.json` and contains AES-256-GCM ciphertext plus plaintext title/description for OG previews. The decryption key lives only in URL fragments and never reaches GitHub or any server.

**Do not edit `shares/` manually.** Use the `md-share` CLI:

- `md-share <file>` — encrypt and publish a new share
- `md-share list` — list shares in this repo
- `md-share search <query>` — fuzzy-search title + description
- `md-share delete <key>` — remove a share
- `md-share <file> --update <key>` — overwrite a share

Generated by `md-share init-storage`. Upstream: https://github.com/alankyshum/md-share
